prompt: Create a cinematic vertical sports poster showing a confident male football champion walking slowly toward the camera through a dark, modern FIFA World Cup player tunnel. He is centered full-body, wearing a black streetwear-inspired football outfit: black long-sleeve jersey with gold trim, a gold crest, small tournament emblems, the word CHAMPION across the chest, black jeans, and black sneakers. His face should be intentionally soft/blurred as if identity-preserved from a reference, while the pose feels calm, victorious, and powerful. He holds one golden World Cup-style trophy in his left hand at chest height. The tunnel walls and ceiling are covered with deep navy LED screens displaying large white text reading WORLD CUP 2026, repeated on the ceiling and both side walls, plus small infinity-like tournament logos and subtle red, cyan, and magenta ribbon graphics. At the tunnel exit behind him, create a glowing stadium entrance with intense white floodlights, green pitch visible at the bottom, and a cheering crowd in soft focus. Add exactly 9 floating foreground/background sports elements: 4 golden World Cup-style trophies positioned upper left, mid-right, lower left, and lower right; and 5 black-and-white soccer balls positioned upper right large cropped, left-center small, lower-left mid, bottom-right large cropped, and one additional small ball near the left wall. Use dramatic volumetric lighting, glossy reflections on the floor, strong backlight halo, shallow depth of field, high-contrast blue-and-gold color grading, realistic photographic detail, and a triumphant commercial advertising style. Vertical 9:16 composition, no watermark, no extra logos beyond the tournament-style marks, keep text legible and bold.
